Phase-63.NAME: Visible Logo Integration
Phase-63.objective: Integrate prepared KrotPN logos into visible premium surfaces where they improve brand identity.
Phase-63.non-goals: Changing BIMI DNS semantics, claiming mailbox sender-avatar control, deploy/install changes.

steps.step-1: Audit available logo PNG sizes from 16x16 through 1024x1024.
steps.step-2: Select optimized source sizes for public hero/auth, user layout, admin layout, PWA, favicon, and email body use.
steps.step-3: Define visible logo placement rules for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
steps.step-4: Integrate logo into premium public/auth surfaces.
steps.step-5: Integrate compact logo into user and admin shells where it does not crowd navigation.
steps.step-6: Coordinate email-logo use with Phase-64 and existing M-069/M-067 boundaries.
steps.step-7: Run user/admin builds, logo smoke, screenshots, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected surface guard.

Phase-63.acceptance: KrotPN logo appears consistently and compactly without asset bloat or BIMI/email-avatar confusion.
Phase-63.evidence: 2026-06-04: Phase-63 selected the prepared 96x96 PNG as bounded visible mark, copied it to user/admin public brand assets, added reusable user/admin BrandMark components, integrated compact visible logos into public/auth, protected user shell, admin login, admin rail, and admin topbar, preserved existing email body logo and BIMI/provider boundaries, passed user/admin builds, Phase-63 smoke, Phase-55/56/57/58/60/61/62 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard. Implementation commit c385d62.
